description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foot even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a long way in creating footwear for those who demand comfort to the T. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet with just the body warmth, this flip flop is a hot favourite among most people. Incredibly easy to clean, Crocs makes for a great footwear when working in the garden or in wet and messy conditions. Upper · Single piece upper of straps and footbed made of EVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfort Thong straps with a toe separator Massage nubs ergonomically placed and curved footbed that is fungus, bacteria and odour resistant · Mild heel cup on the footbed to support the heel Outsole · Slip resistant outsole · Leaf-styled waffle pattern lugs on the forefoot and heel for ample grip, stability and comfort Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
